mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON m.id = rm.menu_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.type != 2 AND m.visible = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id ASC, m.sort ASC
